description: Extraction Test Set: 10 questions requiring verbatim clause quotes from the contract
purpose: Tests whether the system can retrieve and quote exact contract language rather than paraphrasing. Critical for legal accuracy where exact wording matters (e.g., 'shall' vs 'may', exact dollar amounts, specific date cutoffs).

evaluation_criteria.verbatim_match: System must quote exact contract language, not paraphrase
evaluation_criteria.citation_accuracy: Must cite the correct Article and Section
evaluation_criteria.completeness: Must include the full relevant clause, not truncate key terms

test_cases.question: Quote the exact contract language that defines the term of this agreement, including all effective dates.
test_cases.why_verbatim_matters: Exact start and end dates are legally binding

test_cases.question: Quote the exact language defining the probationary period for new employees.
test_cases.expected_verbatim_fragment: worked a total of five hundred twenty (520) hours
test_cases.why_verbatim_matters: The exact hour threshold determines when employee protections begin

test_cases.question: What is the exact contract language regarding management's right to make rules? Quote the full provision.
test_cases.expected_verbatim_fragment: make such necessary and reasonable rules and regulations not in conflict with the express provisions of this Agreement
test_cases.why_verbatim_matters: The qualifier 'not in conflict with express provisions' is legally critical

test_cases.question: Quote the exact language that defines when overtime pay begins in a regular workday.
test_cases.expected_verbatim_fragment: in excess of eight (8) hours in any one (1) day
test_cases.why_verbatim_matters: The 8-hour threshold and 'in any one day' scope are legally binding

test_cases.question: Quote the exact contract language regarding the Sunday premium for employees hired on or before March 26, 2005.
test_cases.why_verbatim_matters: The exact multiplier (1.25x vs other rates) and the date cutoff are critical

test_cases.question: Quote the exact language defining what constitutes 'just cause' for discharge or the limits on the arbitrator's authority regarding discharge cases.
test_cases.expected_verbatim_fragment: The arbitrator shall have no power to add to, subtract from, or modify the terms of this Agreement
test_cases.why_verbatim_matters: The exact scope of arbitral authority determines what remedies are available

test_cases.question: Quote the exact language regarding the Cake Decorator displacement protection during layoffs.
test_cases.expected_verbatim_fragment: six (6) months experience as a Cake Decorator within the last three (3) years
test_cases.why_verbatim_matters: The exact experience threshold and lookback period determine bumping rights

test_cases.question: Quote the exact contract language regarding the working spouse provision for health benefits.
test_cases.why_verbatim_matters: The exact terms define when the surcharge applies and what notification is required

test_cases.question: Quote the exact language regarding the employee's right to refuse a lie detector test.
test_cases.expected_verbatim_fragment: No employee shall be required or requested to take or submit to a lie detector test
test_cases.why_verbatim_matters: The difference between 'required' and 'requested' broadens the protection

test_cases.question: Quote the exact language regarding the retroactive liability limit for wage grievances.
test_cases.why_verbatim_matters: The exact retroactive period limits the monetary remedy available in wage disputes
